items.title: 1st Place – Innovation in Water Apps
items.description: Together with my best friend, civil engineer Joseph A. Murcio, we won first place in the national water-themed app development contest with the project aquasense.

items.title: 3rd Place – National Computer Science Marathon
items.description: Together with my friends Ernesto, Tania and Carlos, we won 3rd place in the computer science knowledge marathon.
